creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: swills
Date: Tue Apr 15 01:57:12 2014
New Revision: 351302
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/351302
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r351302/

Log:
  - Stage [1]
  - Pet portlint [1]
  - Avoid deprecated USE_PYDISTUTILS=easy_install
  - Use automatic PLIST
  
  PR:		ports/188558 [1]
  Submitted by:	Bartek Rutkowski <ports@robakdesign.com> [1]
  Approved by:	portmgr@ (blanket)

Deleted:
  head/devel/py-repoze.who-friendlyform/pkg-plist
Modified:
  head/devel/py-repoze.who-friendlyform/Makefile
  head/devel/py-repoze.who-friendlyform/pkg-descr

Modified: head/devel/py-repoze.who-friendlyform/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/py-repoze.who-friendlyform/Makefile	Tue Apr 15 01:41:33 2014	(r351301)
+++ head/devel/py-repoze.who-friendlyform/Makefile	Tue Apr 15 01:57:12 2014	(r351302)
@@ -8,7 +8,7 @@ MASTER_SITES=	CHEESESHOP
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}
 
 MAINTAINER=	ychsiao@ychsiao.org
-COMMENT=	A collection of developer-friendly for repoze.who-powered
+COMMENT=	Collection of developer-friendly for repoze.who-powered
 
 BUILD_DEPENDS=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}coverage>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/py-coverage \
 		${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}nose>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/py-nose \
@@ -18,8 +18,8 @@ RUN_DEPENDS:=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}cov
 		${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}repoze.who>=1.0.15:${PORTSDIR}/devel/py-repoze.who
 
 USE_PYTHON=	yes
-USE_PYDISTUTILS=	easy_install
+USE_PYDISTUTILS=yes
 PYDISTUTILS_PKGNAME=	repoze.who-friendlyform
+PYDISTUTILS_AUTOPLIST=	yes
 
-NO_STAGE=	yes
 .include <bsd.port.mk>

Modified: head/devel/py-repoze.who-friendlyform/pkg-descr
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/py-repoze.who-friendlyform/pkg-descr	Tue Apr 15 01:41:33 2014	(r351301)
+++ head/devel/py-repoze.who-friendlyform/pkg-descr	Tue Apr 15 01:57:12 2014	(r351302)
@@ -6,4 +6,4 @@ although for the time being such a colle
 one item.
 
 
-WWW:	http://code.gustavonarea.net/repoze.who-friendlyform/
+WWW: http://code.gustavonarea.net/repoze.who-friendlyform/
